products.name: Stribog UAS
products.descriptor: Open-architecture ISR quadcopter with GNSS-denied capability and modular payload

evidence.snippet:
Stribog UAS
===========
Extremely powerful quadcopter with an open architecture, allowing developers to build their own missions.
*   NVIDIA Jetson Xavier NX / Orin NX
*   GNSS-denied capabilities
*   Open modular architecture
*   Modular payload
*   Radio DoodleLabs or Silvus
*   60 min. flight (no payload)

products.name: Patron FPV
products.descriptor: AI-enabled FPV drone for operator training with AI algorithms

evidence.snippet:
Patron FPV
----------
With conventional FPV drones, only one out of five strike missions meets the objective. Artificial intelligence can substantially increase mission success. Patron FPV is the right tool to teach operators to work with AI algorithms effectively.

products.name: DroneCore Pilot
products.descriptor: Single pilot board with NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX and redundant FMU for UAV development

evidence.snippet:
===============
For faster, smarter, more resilient UAV development
Single Pilot board based on NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX combines with various extension kits for copters, fixed-wings, VTOLs, FPVs, and more.
*   NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX
*   Cube Blue / Orange / Red
*   Secondary redundant FMU
*   Open modular architecture
[Technical data](https://docs.airvolute.com/autopilots/dcs2/.pilot-boards/dcs2.pilot-v-1.0/connectors-and-pinouts)

products.notes: Product name appears in crawl_index as shop accessory URL (skipped_class_budget). Stribog specs reference a stereo camera with 120mm baseline used as forward sensor.

unresolved_questions: Patron FPV product page (?page_id=2385) was not fetched — readiness, specs, and NDAA status are unknown.
DCS Hedgehog individual shop page was skipped — no description, pricing, or NDAA status available beyond the shop thumbnail.
DroneCore Jerboa shop/product page was not found in the corpus; details come only from the NDAA declaration document.

NDAA declaration table (resource-0010 line 47) is serialized as a single long line (~120 words) that exceeds the 60-word citation limit. Per-product NDAA=yes claims for autopilot boards, extension kits, and payload adapters are backed by table-header context (lines 42–46) rather than the product-specific compliance row.
The DroneCore Pilot Pro FPV Kit is not listed in the NDAA declaration; NDAA status unknown.
DroneCore 1.2 Pilot is the older generation used in Stribog; unclear whether it is still sold separately or only available as part of the Stribog system.

fetch_requests.reason: Individual product page for DCS 2 Default would confirm variants, full description, and NDAA language at product level.
Individual product page for DCS 2 Pixhawk v6X; needed for variant details and NDAA confirmation.
DCS Hedgehog product page has no price or description in corpus; needed for readiness and NDAA status.
Patron FPV product page — only linked from homepage nav; no specs, readiness, or NDAA data available.
Stereo Vision System for UXVs product page; needed to confirm product name, description, and readiness.
NDAA declaration landing page may contain a formatted, per-product compliance table that is more citable than the PDF (resource-0010 line 47 is a single ~120-word line).
Stribog product sheet page; would provide detailed specs and possible NDAA/compliance info for Stribog UAS.
Hadron Payload Adapter product page for full description and NDAA confirmation at SKU level.
G-Hadron Payload Adapter product page for full description and NDAA confirmation.
NextVision Payload Adapter product page for full description and NDAA confirmation.
